name: Messenger.GeneralModel
comment:
# General Model

General model is designed to be an abstract interface of scenes, layers, components, game components, etc..

  - a: data type
  - b: environment type
  - c: init type
  - d: message type
  - e: target type
  - f: render type

@docs GeneralModel
@docs viewModelList, viewModelArray

aliases.name: GeneralModel
aliases.comment:
General Model.

This has a name field.
aliases.type: { name : String.String, data : a, init : b -> c -> a, update : b -> d -> a -> ( a, List.List ( e, d ), b ), view : b -> a -> f }

values.name: viewModelArray
values.type: b -> Array.Array (Messenger.GeneralModel.GeneralModel a b c d e f) -> List.List f

values.name: viewModelList
values.type: b -> List.List (Messenger.GeneralModel.GeneralModel a b c d e f) -> List.List f

name: Messenger.Recursion

aliases.name: Matcher
aliases.comment: Return true if the target is the sender (second argument)

aliases.name: RecBody
aliases.comment:
RecBody type.

Pass this as an argument to the updater
aliases.type: { update : Messenger.Recursion.Updater a b c d, match : Messenger.Recursion.Matcher a d, super : Messenger.Recursion.Super d }

aliases.name: Super
aliases.comment: Return true if the target is the parent

aliases.name: Updater
aliases.comment:
The updater
a: message sender (object)
b: message
c: environment messages
d: target
aliases.type: a -> c -> b -> ( a, List.List ( d, b ), c )

name: Messenger.RecursionArray

values.name: getObject
values.comment: Get the object that matches the target (the first one)
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.Matcher a d -> d -> Array.Array a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: getObjectIndex
values.comment:
Get the index of the object that matches the target (the first one)

TODO: use better algorithm
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.Matcher a d -> d -> Array.Array a -> Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int

values.name: getObjectIndices
values.comment: Get the indices of the objects that match the target
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.Matcher a d -> d -> Array.Array a -> List.List Basics.Int

values.name: getObjects
values.comment: Get the objects that match the target
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.Matcher a d -> d -> Array.Array a -> Array.Array a

values.name: updateObjectByIndex
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.RecBody a b c d -> c -> b -> Basics.Int -> Array.Array a -> ( Array.Array a, List.List ( d, b ), c )

values.name: updateObjects
values.comment: Recursively update all the objects in the List
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.RecBody a b c d -> c -> b -> Array.Array a -> ( Array.Array a, List.List b, c )

values.name: updateObjectsByTarget
values.comment: Update all the objects that match the target
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.RecBody a b c d -> c -> b -> d -> Array.Array a -> ( Array.Array a, List.List ( d, b ), c )
